text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is looking over at me with a sleepy
expression...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Oh, Trainer, you're such a sweet little
cutie-pie...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I'm sorry. It seems I had my head in the
clouds for a bit there...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I need to get myself together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You work so hard to pick all these races for me... I
need to try harder... to win them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek mumbles before slipping back into
her drowsy reverie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Have I put too much on her plate? I might need
to rethink her race schedule.
